items.q: What freight fits in a cargo van?
items.a: Small parcel deliveries under 2 pallets. Last-mile residential or commercial delivery.

items.q: How many pallets can a cargo van carry?
items.a: A cargo van typically handles 1-2 pallets with a max weight capacity of 2,500-3,500 lbs.

items.q: When should I NOT use a cargo van?
items.a: Freight exceeding 3,500 lbs. Standard pallet loads requiring dock-height access.

items.q: Does WARP offer cargo van shipping?
items.a: Yes. WARP operates a fleet that includes cargo van capacity, matched to shipment size through our right-sized asset approach.

rendered.body_text:
Enclosed cargo van for small-freight and last-mile delivery

A cargo van handles 1-2 pallets with a capacity of 2,500-3,500 lbs. Interior dimensions: 10-12 ft length, 5-6 ft height.

Best fit for: Small parcel deliveries under 2 pallets; Last-mile residential or commercial delivery.

Get an instant cargo van freight rate at wearewarp.com/quote.
rendered.primary_content_html:
Cargo Van Overview

Enclosed cargo van for small-freight and last-mile delivery

Mode: Cargo Van / Box Truck

Cargo Van Specifications

SpecificationValue
Capacity Pallets1-2
Capacity Lbs2,500-3,500
Interior Length Ft10-12
Interior Height Ft5-6
Door Typerear swing or roll-up

Best Fit Freight for Cargo Van

  • Small parcel deliveries under 2 pallets
  • Last-mile residential or commercial delivery
  • Expedited local freight within metro areas
  • High-value, low-weight shipments requiring direct handling

When to Choose a Different Vehicle

  • Freight exceeding 3,500 lbs
  • Standard pallet loads requiring dock-height access
  • Temperature-controlled shipments
  • Loads requiring liftgate (no liftgate option)

Solutions Using This Equipment

  • Store Replenishment — Scheduled multi-stop retail freight delivery using LTL and right-sized assets

Related Network Capabilities

  • Right-Sized Assets — Matching vehicle type and capacity to actual shipment size for cost efficiency
  • Flexible Routing — Dynamic route optimization based on real-time freight density and delivery requirements
  • Scan-Level Visibility — Item-level or pallet-level tracking with scan events at every handling point

Ship with Cargo Van Today

Get Instant Quote Book a Fit Call
